stories.title: MetricCard shared component
stories.notes: Mono font 32px, accent left border, optional trend arrow.

stories.title: Dashboard metric cards row
stories.notes: 4 cards: total=35, inStock=20, low=10, out=5 from seed data.

stories.title: Needs Attention section
stories.notes: Low stock list (max 5), out of stock, pending POs. CheckCircle empty state.

stories.title: ActivityItem shared component
stories.notes: Icons per movement type, +/- color, relative timestamp via date-fns.

stories.title: Recent activity feed
stories.notes: 20 recent movements, scrollable, dividers, View All link.

stories.title: Dashboard quick search bar
stories.notes: Instant filter dropdown, 8 max results, StatusBadge, No items found state.

stories.title: Dashboard page layout composition
stories.notes: 60/40 two-column for attention+activity, responsive stacking, max-w-1400.
